title: centaurea zlatarskyana
intro: Centaurea zlatarskyana is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, known for its bright yellow flowers and medicinal properties. Traditionally used in folk medicine, Centaurea zlatarskyana is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and swelling, as well as fight off infections. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, easing respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Centaurea zlatarskyana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
